message:
feat(widgets): Add LogViewer widget for agent harness

Implement scrolling log viewer optimized for streaming append-only content:
- Circular buffer with configurable max capacity and O(1) eviction
- Auto-scroll / follow mode with manual scroll override
- Page up/down navigation
- Wrap modes (NoWrap, CharWrap, WordWrap)
- StatefulWidget pattern for scroll state preservation
- Scroll position indicator

12 unit tests covering:
- Circular buffer behavior
- Auto-scroll logic
- Manual scrolling
- Rendering

This is THE essential widget for agent harness UIs (bd-29v).
Unblocks bd-3t87 (Progressive Rendering) and bd-2kj (Agent Harness).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
